content.thinking: 让我创建一个同步脚本，然后告诉用户需要配置GitHub认证才能推送。

content.text: 创建同步脚本：

arguments.content:
#!/bin/bash
# OpenClaw to GitHub Sync Script
# Syncs roles and skills to amazon-agent-workspace repository

cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/amazon-agent-workspace

# Add updated files
git add AGENTS.md SOUL.md USER.md TOOLS.md IDENTITY.md TASK_TEMPLATES.md HEARTBEAT.md skills/ agents/

# Check if there are changes
if git diff --staged --quiet; then
    echo "$(date): No changes to sync"
    exit 0
fi

# Commit changes
git commit -m "Sync from OpenClaw - $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"

# Push to GitHub
git push origin main

echo "$(date): Sync completed successfully"

arguments.command:
python3 -c "
import subprocess
# 读取当前crontab
result = subprocess.run(['crontab', '-l'], capture_output=True, text=True)
current = result.stdout if result.returncode == 0 else ''

# 添加新任务
new_cron = '''0 0 * * * /Users/mumian/.openclaw/sync_to_github.sh >> /Users/mumian/.openclaw/sync_cron.log 2>&1
0 8 * * * /Users/mumian/.openclaw/workspace/amazon-agent-workspace/sync-github.sh >> /Users/mumian/.openclaw/workspace/amazon-agent-workspace/sync.log 2>&1
'''

# 写入crontab
p = subprocess.Popen(['crontab', '-'], stdin=subprocess.PIPE)
p.communicate(input=new_cron.encode())
print('Crontab updated')
"

content.thinking: 让我换个思路，检查是否有现成的同步脚本可以使用，或者用其他方式。先检查用户的现有同步脚本。

content.text: 检查现有同步脚本：

#!/bin/bash

# OpenClaw文件同步到GitHub脚本
# 同步内容：OpenClaw下的角色md文件(agents/)和skills文件(skills/)

OPENCLAW_DIR="/Users/mumian/.openclaw"
GIT_REPO="git@github.com:Peterszh/amazon-agent-workspace.git"
SYNC_DIR="/Users/mumian/.openclaw/github-sync"
SYNC_LOG="/Users/mumian/.openclaw/sync_log.txt"

echo "===== 开始同步 $(date) =====" >> $SYNC_LOG

# 克隆或更新仓库
if [ -d "$SYNC_DIR/.git" ]; then
    cd $SYNC_DIR
    git pull >> $SYNC_LOG 2>&1
    echo "已更新现有仓库" >> $SYNC_LOG
else
    rm -rf $SYNC_DIR
    git clone $GIT_REPO $SYNC_DIR >> $SYNC_LOG 2>&1
    echo "已克隆仓库" >> $SYNC_LOG
fi

# 同步OpenClaw的agents目录（角色md文件）
echo "同步agents目录..." >> $SYNC_LOG
rm -rf $SYNC_DIR/agents
cp -r $OPENCLAW_DIR/agents $SYNC_DIR/

# 同步OpenClaw的skills目录
echo "同步skills目录..." >> $SYNC_LOG
rm -rf $SYNC_DIR/skills
cp -r $OPENCLAW_DIR/skills $SYNC_DIR/

# 提交并推送
cd $SYNC_DIR
git add -A

# 检查是否有变更需要提交
if git diff --cached --quiet; then
    echo "没有变更需要提交" >> $SYNC_LOG
else
    git commit -m "Auto sync: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >> $SYNC_LOG 2>&1
    git push >> $SYNC_LOG 2>&1
    echo "已推送更新" >> $SYNC_LOG
fi

echo "===== 同步完成 $(date) =====" >> $SYNC_LOG

content.thinking: 有SSH key。让我更新脚本使用SSH方式推送。另外，需要同步workspace下的文件。让我更新现有脚本使其更完整。

content.text: 更新同步脚本，包含workspace下的文件：

arguments.content:
#!/bin/bash

# OpenClaw文件同步到GitHub脚本 (增强版)
# 同步内容：
#   1. OpenClaw下的agents目录和skills目录
#   2. amazon-agent-workspace下的角色md和skills

OPENCLAW_DIR="/Users/mumian/.openclaw"
WORKSPACE_DIR="/Users/mumian/.openclaw/workspace/amazon-agent-workspace"
GIT_REPO="git@github.com:Peterszh/amazon-agent-workspace.git"
SYNC_DIR="/Users/mumian/.openclaw/github-sync"
SYNC_LOG="/Users/mumian/.openclaw/sync_log.txt"

echo "===== 开始同步 $(date) =====" >> $SYNC_LOG

# 克隆或更新仓库
if [ -d "$SYNC_DIR/.git" ]; then
    cd $SYNC_DIR
    git pull >> $SYNC_LOG 2>&1
    echo "已更新现有仓库" >> $SYNC_LOG
else
    rm -rf $SYNC_DIR
    git clone $GIT_REPO $SYNC_DIR >> $SYNC_LOG 2>&1
    echo "已克隆仓库" >> $SYNC_LOG
fi

# 同步OpenClaw的agents目录
echo "同步agents目录..." >> $SYNC_LOG
rm -rf $SYNC_DIR/openclaw-agents
cp -r $OPENCLAW_DIR/agents $SYNC_DIR/openclaw-agents

# 同步OpenClaw的skills目录
echo "同步skills目录..." >> $SYNC_LOG
rm -rf $SYNC_DIR/openclaw-skills
cp -r $OPENCLAW_DIR/skills $SYNC_DIR/openclaw-skills

# 同步workspace的角色md文件
echo "同步workspace角色md..." >> $SYNC_LOG
rm -rf $SYNC_DIR/amazon-agent-workspace
mkdir -p $SYNC_DIR/amazon-agent-workspace
cp $WORKSPACE_DIR/AGENTS.md $WORKSPACE_DIR/SOUL.md $WORKSPACE_DIR/USER.md $WORKSPACE_DIR/TOOLS.md $WORKSPACE_DIR/IDENTITY.md $WORKSPACE_DIR/TASK_TEMPLATES.md $WORKSPACE_DIR/HEARTBEAT.md $SYNC_DIR/amazon-agent-workspace/ 2>> $SYNC_LOG

# 同步workspace的skills目录
echo "同步workspace skills..." >> $SYNC_LOG
rm -rf $SYNC_DIR/amazon-agent-workspace/skills
cp -r $WORKSPACE_DIR/skills $SYNC_DIR/amazon-agent-workspace/

# 同步workspace的agents目录
echo "同步workspace agents..." >> $SYNC_LOG
rm -rf $SYNC_DIR/amazon-agent-workspace/agents
cp -r $WORKSPACE_DIR/agents $SYNC_DIR/amazon-agent-workspace/

# 提交并推送
cd $SYNC_DIR
git add -A

# 检查是否有变更需要提交
if git diff --cached --quiet; then
    echo "没有变更需要提交" >> $SYNC_LOG
else
    git commit -m "Auto sync: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >> $SYNC_LOG 2>&1
    git push >> $SYNC_LOG 2>&1
    echo "已推送更新" >> $SYNC_LOG
fi

echo "===== 同步完成 $(date) =====" >> $SYNC_LOG
